properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 67/22
 NORWEGIAN SEA
 RAMFORM ATLAS / C6AX2 IS CONDUCTING A SEISMIC SURVEY IN AN AREA BOUNDED BY THE FOLLOWING COORDINATES:
 A. 66-11.3N 009-03.1E
 B. 64-39.2N 006-42.1E
 C. 64-58.9N 005-26.0E
 D. 66-31.5N 007-45.7E
 VESSEL IS TOWING 15 CABLES OF 6NM IN LENGTH, WITH A TOTAL WIDTH OF 1NM. 
 REQUESTS A WIDE BERTH OF ALL PASSING, 3NM AHEAD, 3NM ABEAM AND 8NM ASTERN.
 SUPPORT VESSELS THOR FREYJA / C6BI6 AND 7-WAVES / HP5141 ALL VESSELS ARE MONITORING VHF CH. 16 AND 67
